---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new command or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Description

<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature or improvement you are requesting. -->


## Problem It Solves

<!-- Describe the problem or use-case this feature would address.
     e.g. "When working with CSV data I frequently need to…" -->


## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the feature as you imagine it working.
     If it is a new command, what would the command name be?
     What input (if any) would it require?
     What would the output look like for a sample input? -->


## Alternatives Considered

<!-- Are there workarounds or other plugins that partially address this?
     Why are they not sufficient? -->


## Additional Information

<!-- Screenshots, mockups, links to similar features in other tools, or related issues. -->
